parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Specify the page number of the sanctions to be returned

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Specify the number of sanctions to be returned per page

parameters.name: blockchain_compatibility
parameters.description: Filters out sanctions based on the blockchains

parameters.name: sanction_status
parameters.description: Filters the data to return the sanctions, or the sanctions that has since been removed

parameters.name: created_at_from
parameters.description: Returns the sanctions from the specified date to the current date

parameters.name: created_at_to
parameters.description: Returns the sanctions from beginning until specified date

info.title: Sanctions API
info.description: API which returns the sanctioned addresses

list.description: Specifies the list that the address has been sanctioned

created_at.description: The date the address was sanctioned

removed_at.description: The date the sanctioned address was reverted/removed

created_at.description: The date the sanctioned address was included in Elliptic database

removed_at.description: The date the sanctioned address was reverted/removed from Elliptic database

evm_compatible.description: Optional property specified if the address is EVM compatible

sanction_status.description: Specifies if the address is currently sanctioned, or if the sanction has since been removed

sanctions.description: Specifies the list of sanctions for the address

data.description: Specifies the paginated list of sanctions

page.description: Specifies the current page of sanctions data

size.description: Specifies the number of sanctions returned per page

total_pages.description: Specifies the total pages of sanctions

total_items.description: Specifies the total sanctions matching the filter criteria
